codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature behavior: notify is added to DAEMON_SKILLS in the required position, process_exec schema includes ppid, and tests were added for presence/ordering/schema/prompt intent. No blocking correctness or security issues found in the feature code.

issues.description: test_notify_in_system_prompt does not validate the created agent's actual system prompt; it only checks `", ".join(DAEMON_SKILLS)`. This duplicates `test_notify_in_daemon_skills` and would miss regressions where `create_behavior_agent()` stops embedding DAEMON_SKILLS into the prompt.

sharedStateObservations.observation: notify-worker skill procedure requires TDD red phase (write tests first and run failing tests), but this worker's transcript shows `Edit` on `src/veronica/agent.py` before creating `tests/test_agent.py`; handoff still marked followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/notify-worker/SKILL.md:33-39 requires tests-first; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 4bb139f5-63d3-4fd5-8935-4f29f5ada29c shows `Tool: Edit` on src/veronica/agent.py before `Tool: Create` tests/test_agent.py.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture library still labels notify as planned, which is stale now that notify has been implemented and integrated.

summary: Feature passes review with no blocking defects. One non-blocking test-quality issue was found in `test_notify_in_system_prompt`, and two shared-state observations were recorded (skill procedure adherence mismatch and stale architecture note).
